text_excerpt: News | Richard Holden Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Richard News Have Your Say Parliament Contact Richard Helpful Contacts News Richard takes a quick coffee stop at Gino's The Billericay Wednesday, 22 April, 2026 Richard took a quick break at The Billericay. Speaking afterwards, Richard said: "I popped into The Billericay to see Gino and grab a quick coffee on my way from Billericay to Basildon for some meetings and visits. Those of you who know Gino in the community will know how lovely of a man he is and how hard he works. So please do poke your head through the door and support his business, from coffee...
